sqlMap.select: select * from GrossRevenueForFirm where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and GrossRevenueKey = #GrossRevenueKey#
sqlMap.insert: insert into GrossRevenueForFirm(GrossRevenueKey, VersionSequence, PolicyKey YearEndDate Amount ) values (#GrossRevenueKey:NUMERIC#, #VersionSequence:NUMERIC#, #PolicyKey:NUMERIC# #YearEndDate# #Amount# )
sqlMap.select: select YearEndDate, Amount, GrossRevenueKey, VersionSequence, PolicyKey from GrossRevenueForFirm where GrossRevenueKey = #GrossRevenueKey# and VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.update:
update GrossRevenueForFirm set
YearEndDate = #YearEndDate# YearEndDate = null Amount = #Amount# Amount = null
where GrossRevenueKey = #GrossRevenueKey# and VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.delete: delete from GrossRevenueForFirm where GrossRevenueKey = #GrossRevenueKey# and VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
delete from GrossRevenueForFirm where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and GrossRevenueKey = #GrossRevenueKey#
sqlMap.select: select YearEndDate, Amount, GrossRevenueKey, VersionSequence, PolicyKey from GrossRevenueForFirm where GrossRevenueKey = #GrossRevenueKey# and VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#

select GrossRevenueKey, VersionSequence, PolicyKey, YearEndDate, Amount from GrossRevenueForFirm where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and GrossRevenueKey = #GrossRevenueKey#
